Who We Are

India's Trusted
Plastic Partner

Deepak Plastics Industries is a leading manufacturer and supplier of high-quality plastic packaging solutions based in the Industrial Estate of Chalisgaon, Maharashtra. We serve businesses across various sectors with reliable, durable, and industry-grade plastic products.

Under the leadership of Mr. Sajan Vaswani, we combine cutting-edge manufacturing processes with strict quality control to deliver products that meet and exceed customer expectations every time.

What We Offer

Our Product Range

01
Flawless Finish Kirana Bags

Premium quality carry bags designed for kirana stores and retail outlets, offering a smooth, flawless finish that enhances your brand presentation.

Retail Packaging Enquiry on WhatsApp
02
High Strength Inner Plastic Bags

Engineered for superior tensile strength, these inner bags provide excellent protection for sensitive products against moisture, dust, and pressure.

Industrial Grade Enquiry on WhatsApp
03
Plastic Packaging Bags

Versatile, durable, and customizable packaging bags suitable for food, textile, hardware, and general commodity packaging across industries.

Multi-Industry Enquiry on WhatsApp
04
High Grade LDPE Plastic Granules

Top-quality Low Density Polyethylene granules ideal for manufacturing flexible films, tubes, and bags. Consistent quality for uninterrupted production.

Raw Material Enquiry on WhatsApp
05
Heat-Resistant Plastic Granules

Specially formulated granules capable of withstanding high temperatures without degradation, ideal for hot-fill applications and demanding environments.

Speciality Grade Enquiry on WhatsApp
